entry.title: Learn
entry.heroBody: A short adaptive set — multiple choice, free text, numbers and ordering. Get it wrong and we teach, not just mark.
entry.resumeTitle: Picking up where you left off
entry.dueNote: {{count}} items due today · keep it alive.
entry.dueNoteEmpty: Nothing due — today's session plants new seeds.
entry.resumeEmpty: Nothing in progress yet — start today's session.

run.promiseBody: Every miss earns an explanation, not a red ✕. We schedule a comeback so it actually sticks.
run.errorBody: Something went wrong while loading today's questions. Check your connection and try again.

reveal.feltQuestion: Did that feel like learning or a test?
reveal.feltLearnNote: Good — that's the goal. We'll keep this rhythm.
reveal.feltTestNote: Noted — we'll add more teaching scaffolding before the next one like it.
reveal.scheduleNote: We schedule a comeback so it sticks.

summary.title: Session done
summary.body: You worked through {{count}} questions. The point wasn't the score — it's what moved into your long-term memory.

review.title: Your memory schedule
review.lockedBlurb: Spacing out — you recall these reliably. Next nudge is days away, not now.
review.learningBlurb: Coming back soon while the memory is still forming. Short intervals on purpose.
